name: al80-studio
description: WebHID control panel for the YUNZII AL80 — LCD (clock, picture, GIF, slideshow), RGB lighting, and a live VIA keymap editor.

scripts.test: node test/protocol.test.mjs && node test/keymap.test.mjs && node test/nowplaying.test.mjs && node test/slots.test.mjs && node test/effects.test.mjs && node host/test/nowplaying.test.mjs && node host/test/device.dryrun.test.mjs && node host/test/roundtrip.test.mjs && node host/test/scheduler.test.mjs
